docs.title: Projects
docs.text: Access documentation for all my projects. These are included in the respective repositories (docs folder) and work with HTML/JS/CSS, making them accessible on any device without requiring a web server. For any issues or questions, contact us at requests@bugfish.eu.

docs.title: bugfishCMS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A multi-site PHP CMS for quick website deployment. It simplifies setup, customization, and maintenance, ideal for managing multiple sites on a single platform.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Bugfish Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A robust framework integrating PHP, CSS, and JavaScript to streamline web application development.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Bind9 Web Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A PHP-based DNS management tool with user administration and replication features, compatible with Plesk, ISPConfig, and Virtualmin.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Dolibarr Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A Dolibarr module that integrates the Bugfish Framework, adding development tools and logging features.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Mail Relaying over DNS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Transforms your server into a mail backup relay, storing and forwarding mail when the primary server is offline.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Online Book Renting
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A web-based platform for managing book rentals, featuring user management, multi-language support, and ISBN handling.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Android Web App Example
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 An Android Studio project to create a simple web app with navigation controls, easily customizable for your website.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Dovecot Certificate Interface
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Automates Dovecot per-domain SSL certificate setup, managing ISPConfig configurations or working independently.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Image Download Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Downloads images from a website, with options to explore subpages and filter high-definition images.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: jQuery Sortselect
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A jQuery plugin that enhances <select> elements with dual sortable select boxes for better UI control.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Proxmox VMA2RAW
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Converts Proxmox VMA backup files to raw disk images using a Docker image.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Who am I?
docs.text:
My name is Jan-Maurice Dahlmanns, born 1994 and dedicated software developer and server administrator since 2008.

Here you can find some information about what I do! Feel free to take a look at my YouTube Channel, where I have also uploaded some video documentations and more. If you want to support me, please subscribe to my YouTube channel!

docs.title: Personal Channels
docs.text:
If you want to get in touch or intel about me you can find me on the following pages!

  • Facebook
  • Patreon
  • Steam
  • Blog
  • Twitter
  • TikTok
  • Discord
  • AllPoetry

docs.text:
You can find images and stock videos for projects i made and reuse them if you want.

In my free time i like to create music. You can download all my music tracks for free on bandcamp!

docs.title: Code Channels
docs.text:
My open-source software projects are listed in the 'Documentation' section of this website. There, you can find buttons to view different project documentations or download them directly from GitHub! These projects are also listed in the Projects section of my website.

  • GitHub

docs.title: Infrastructure
docs.text: We use an internal infrastructure to test our projects on.

docs.title: hive.hv-inf.de
docs.text:
Hypervisor to host Shadow, Thunder and Sunrise KVM.

Service Technology Details URL Administration Webmin Server Manager Interface Visit KVM Manager Proxmox Hypervisor Manager Visit

docs.title: thunder.hv-inf.de
docs.text:
Primary hosting server for all kind of services and websites.

Service Technology Details URL Administration Webmin Server Manager Interface Visit DNS Server DNSHTTP / Bind9 Secondary DNS Server Visit

Useable services on this server "thunder" are explained at the upper section "Services".

docs.title: shadow.hv-inf.de
docs.text:
Backup Server for primary services hosted on thunder.

Service Technology Details URL Administration Webmin Server Manager Interface Visit DNS Server DNSHTTP / Bind9 Secondary DNS Server Visit Mail Backup Relay MROD / Postfix Secondary Incoming Backup Relay Visit

docs.title: sunrise.hv-inf.de
docs.text: Just an internal testing server.

docs.title: License
docs.text: This documentation is created using MkDocs and the Material for MkDocs theme. Both MkDocs and the Material theme are licensed under the MIT License.

docs.title: Documentation License
docs.text:
Unless otherwise noted, all documentation content on this site is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) license. This means you are free to:

  • Share — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format
  • Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the material for any purpose, even commercially

Under the following terms:

  • Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.

docs.title: Project Licenses
docs.text:
Please note that the individual projects documented on this site are governed by their own licenses. You can find the specific license information for each project on its respective documentation page or repository. Be sure to review these licenses as they may differ from the license governing this documentation.

For any questions or more information, feel free to contact us.

docs.title: Services
docs.text: If you have access to our services, you can find areas here to login. Besides that you can find information for some services we are hosting.

docs.title: Hosting
docs.text: If you are the administrator of a hosting account on our primary webmin instance you can login here: https://bugfish.eu:10000

docs.title: Webmail
docs.text: We have "Usermin" installed for our webserver users to configure theire webmail and more here: https://bugfish.eu:20000/

docs.title: DNS
docs.text:
If you want to use our DNS Servers for hosting Domain Records set up this DNS Servers at your Domain Hoster.

Primary: thunder.hv-inf.de Secondary: shadow.hv-inf.de

docs.title: Mail
docs.text:
Here you can see recommended E-Mail Settings for your E-Mail Client to connect to our server.

IMAP Hostname: mail.bugfish.eu IMAP Username: Your Full E-Mail Address IMAP Password: Your E-Mail Password IMAP Port: 993 SMTP Method: SSL IMAP Auth: Normal Password

SMTP Hostname: mail.bugfish.eu SMTP Username: Your Full E-Mail Address SMTP Password: Your E-Mail Password SMTP Port: 587 SMTP Method: STARTLS SMTP Auth: Normal Password

docs.title: Cloud
docs.text: If you have an account for our files cloud you can login here: https://files.bugfish.eu/index.php/login

docs.title: VPN
docs.text: We have a SoftEther VPN Server Instance running on our main Server. If you have administrator privilegues you can connect to the default ports or with an registered user on your specific vpn instance.

docs.title: Support
docs.text: If you need assistance or have questions, you can reach out through any of the following support channels:

docs.title: Forum
docs.text: For community-driven support and discussions, visit our Forum. Here, you can ask questions, share information, and get help from other users.

docs.title: GitHub Issues
docs.text: For technical issues or to request new features, please use the GitHub Issues Page associated with this project. You can find the link in the Downloads section or the topbar of our site.

docs.title: Email
docs.text: For direct support or if you prefer to communicate via email, please send your inquiries to requests@bugfish.eu.

docs.title: Websites
docs.text: This websites are hosted in our infrastructure and serve different purposes.

docs.title: bugfish.eu
docs.text: This is my main website to showcase all kind of projects and much more: https://bugfish.eu

docs.title: cms.bugfish.eu
docs.text: Administrator Backend Module of bugfishCMS for us to control our services or for users to register if required: https://cms.bugfish.eu. This website act as our control point.

docs.title: forum.bugfish.eu
docs.text: This domain will forward you to our Forum: https://forum.bugfish.eu

docs.title: lab.bugfish.eu
docs.text: Just an internal testing domain to test different bugfishCMS Websites before release: https://lab.bugfish.eu

docs.title: petition.bugfish.eu
docs.text: A website to promote a petition in germany against corruption: https://petition.bugfish.eu. You can also find the petition here, if you are from germany feel free to support our cause: https://www.openpetition.de/bugfish

docs.title: software.bugfish.eu
docs.text: This page serves to distribute software. You can find our software store on the following url: https://software.bugfish.eu

docs.title: store.bugfish.eu
docs.text: This page serves to distribute modules and core updates to bugfishCMS instances. You can find the module and bugfishCMS store on this url: https://store.bugfish.eu
